title: All About Maru the Cat...
overview: Moe meets Maru after passing out on the street. What is this mysterious creature?

title: Forever With the Sphere
overview: Moe continues her narrative about the Satou family and Poyo’s mysterious nature.

title: The Sphere and Kuro
overview: Poyo has a new cat friend, Kurobee, and shows Hide why he is so dashing.

title: The Sphere's Three Neighbors
overview: Poyo earns the respect of the owners' Farmers Market, and we meet Hide's classmates Maki and Suzuki.

title: Come In, Sphere
overview: It is the start of the New Year, and traditional beans thrown for Setsubun affect the pets of Moe, Maki, and Kouta differently.

title: When With a Sphere, Do as the Sphere Does!
overview: Poyo is acting as a surrogate mother for the orphaned kittens, while the Satou’s search for adopters. But spending time with Poyo, each kitten is developing a unique trait.

title: Snow Falling on Spheres
overview: Kurobee, the cat next door, is missing. The old lady next door has enlisted the Satou family and friends to help find him.

title: Come, Sphere
overview: Moe works out during the winter season, Poyo gives up his secret base, and a girl will wear anything in the cold to look cute.

title: The Sphere Has Been Waiting for You
overview: Granny has won an overnight trip to a hot spring but is reluctant to leave Kuro alone. Hide agrees to watch Kuro and Poyo, so Moe and Granny can enjoy the trip.

title: The Sphere Stood Up
overview: Moe explains the various tricks and behavior of Poyo. The other pet owners share the quirks of Kuro, Tsuku, and Daifuku.

title: The Sphere is Nice and Warm
overview: When spring arrives, the routines change around the household. Let’s check in with Poyo’s family and see how they are handling the season change.

title: The Season of the Sphere
overview: It is strawberry season and an old friend of Poyo’s is back. Hide, Moe, and Maki are enlisted to work at Akai’s Strawberry Field.

title: The Sphere of Blessings
overview: Spring is here, it’s time to show a little skin, be a little lazy, and suffer from allergies.

title: The Hated Sphere
overview: The Satou's have new neighbors, the Tanakas. The Wife, Yuka is afraid of animals; how will she react to Poyo?

title: Sphere Snapshots
overview: Moe is determined to get Poyo into cat magazines. Everyone offers their own version of what it will take to make it happen.

title: The Sphere Fights
overview: The Legacy of Poyo continues around the neighborhood, but does anyone know what he is?

title: The Sphere Weather
overview: Moe attempts to create a Poyo steamed cake, Grandma learns to appreciate her Kuro, and Poyo might be a superhero!

title: The Real Ladies' Sphere
overview: A new cat is in the neighborhood causing unexpected trouble for Poyo.

title: Sphere Baldness
overview: A new house is being built in the area where the cats like to play; Poyo gets himself in a sticky situation.

title: Mysterious Sphere
overview: A sudden phone call causes Moe to run out of the house leaving her Papa worried. And Yuka-san provides great story material for Hide.

title: The Sphere's Habits
overview: We get a peek into the favorite phrases and habits of cat owners.

title: Sphere Magistrate
overview: Poyo is the unofficial ruler of the neighborhood, but what happens when one of this subjects become a temporary housemate?

title: Drizzle, Drizzle, Sphere, Sphere
overview: Everybody spends their time different on a rainy day, animals and humans alike.

title: Rain and Toads on Spheres
overview: During the rainy season cabin fever sets in and guardian spirit comes out.

title: Let's Do Some Sphere-ious Tidying
overview: The Satou household is on a cleaning spree!

title: Spherely-Poly
overview: Food can be a power weapon or super cute, as everything is better when it looks like Poyo!

title: The Bamboo Leaves Rustle in the Spheres
overview: Cats and humans alike enjoy Tanabata.

title: The Summer-Colored Sphere
overview: Summer has come and everyone handles it a different way.

title: Summer All A-Round
overview: The summer season continues and we focus this time on Kurobee and Hide.

title: Aloha Sphere
overview: The heat is bad and everybody is dealing with it in their own special way.

title: The Roundest Day of Summer
overview: Cucumbers, watermelons, and snakes all make for great summer snacks.

title: Round Summer Mystery
overview: A monk has come to perform a Buddhist memorial service and runs into Poyo.

title: The Lantern Festival Should be Round
Rumble, Flash, Spheres Pouring Down
overview: The weather turns the conversation into a game of “What If”?

title: Next to the Sphere Was Another Sphere
overview: It is the season for Chrysanthemum.

title: The Sphere Circled Round or Whatever
overview: Moe has an obvious addiction to all that is round.

title: Fur Everywhere, Spheres Everywhere
overview: It's all about pet hair and beauty salons.

title: Because the World is So Round
overview: What would happen if Poyo went to space… or was from space?

title: It Was a Sphere Like a Lantern
overview: Living with Poyo pays off at the sports fest and Papa Satou doesn't fool around with thieves.

title: As Autumn Deepens, What Does the Sphere Do?
overview: The colder air makes everyone a bit rounder.

title: A Fighting Sphere Shot!
overview: How strong are the members of the Satou family?

title: I Found a Tiny Sphere
overview: All about Daifuku!

title: Read, See, Sphere
overview: Does Poyo have what it takes to be a model?

title: Round, Round, Grumble and Frown
overview: A cat never forgives and never forgets.

title: It Was a Sphere Tastier Than a Chestnut
overview: Meat, potatoes, and a little weight gain.

title: The Sphere of Warring States (1)
overview: Moe has been transported back to the Warring States era.

title: The Sphere of Warring States (2)
overview: Moe has been transported back to the Warring States era and she is getting married?!

title: With Love and Spheres
overview: How do you stay warm in the winter?

title: Sneeze Three Times, Take Three Spheres
overview: Hide is sick and Poyo is there to help.

title: Where There Are Spheres in Life, Life is All Spheres.
overview: The 50th Episode Reference-loaded Extravaganza! Hya~

title: They Call It the Month That Makes Even Monks Run Around
overview: What do you do to celebrate the end of the year?

title: Until We Come 'Round Again
overview: So long, round cat.
